hoalakshmyel Namah•. Tie this thread at your buslness·shop or
establishment. Your business shall flourish. For those in service should
keep this thread in the drawer of their table for better service
conditions and to get quick promotion.
Those going on a repeated business trips should keep one and a
quarter rupee at a safe and hidden place. After coming back g;ve
that to a beggar. Your mission will be accomplished easily and
smoothly.
Should you be finding labour troubJe in your unit, pick up an iron
nail !that you happen to find lying on your way while coming to
your concern. wash it first in a buffalo's unit and then with Ganga
water and throw it towal'ds the shed where your wotkers work.
The wor1<ers will not create any disturbance and your concern will
do well.
Procure 7 green chilies with straight stetn and a lime on any Tuesday.
Thread them all in a black. thread and tie them with the help of a
peg outside your premises. Oo so on every Tuesday. This measure
